subject: math
prompt: Maya examined a set of 78 plants. The lightest plant had a mass of 3.1 kilograms (kg) and the heaviest plant had a mass of 7.4 kg. Omar examined the same set of 78 plants and also an additional plant with a mass of 12.6 kg. Which of the following must be true about the set of plants that Maya examined and the set of plants that Omar examined?
questionText: Maya examined a set of 78 plants. The lightest plant had a mass of 3.1 kilograms (kg) and the heaviest plant had a mass of 7.4 kg. Omar examined the same set of 78 plants and also an additional plant with a mass of 12.6 kg. Which of the following must be true about the set of plants that Maya examined and the set of plants that Omar examined?

choices.text: The standard deviation of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Maya examined is greater than the standard deviation of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Omar examined.
The range of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Maya examined is greater than the range of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Omar examined.
The median of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Maya examined is less than the median of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Omar examined.
The mean of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Maya examined is less than the mean of the masses, in kg, of the plants that Omar examined.

prompt:

subject: math
prompt: Priya is selling books from her book collection. When she started selling the books, there were 3,600 books in the collection. At the end of each week for 4 weeks after Priya started selling the books, the number of books in the collection had decreased by $\frac{1}{2}$ of the books in the collection at the end of the previous week. Which equation gives the number of books, $c$, in the collection $w$ weeks after Priya started selling the books, where $0 \leq w \leq 4$?
questionText: Priya is selling books from her book collection. When she started selling the books, there were 3,600 books in the collection. How many Tenebrio molitor did the biologist move to the second habitat at this time?

prompt: The area A, in square centimeters, of a rectangular mural can be represented by the expression $w(w+64)$, where w is the width, in centimeters, of the mural. Which expression represents the length, in centimeters, of the mural?

subject: math
prompt: An object is launched from a height of 133 feet above the ground. A quadratic function $f$ models the height above the ground, in feet, of the object $t$ seconds after it is launched. According to the model, 3 seconds after the object is launched, it reaches a maximum height of 277 feet above the ground. Which equation defines $f$?
questionText: An object is launched from a height of 133 feet above the ground. A quadratic function $f$ models the height above the ground, in feet, of the object $t$ seconds after it is launched. According to the model, 3 seconds after the object is launched, it reaches a maximum height of 277 feet above the ground. Which equation defines $f$?

subject: math
prompt:
$x^{2} + 48x + y^{2} = 0$
In the $xy$-plane, the graph of the given equation is a circle. What are the coordinates $(x, y)$ of the center of the circle?
